# Kairox AI

> Kairox FZC LLC builds AI employees and workflow automation for UAE SMEs.

Kairox helps businesses automate lead response, WhatsApp conversations, customer support, appointment booking, AI reception, CRM updates, reporting and repetitive operations.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://kairoxly.com/)
- [AI Automation UAE Guide](https://kairoxly.com/ai-automation-uae-guide.html)
- [Solutions](https://kairoxly.com/solutions.html)
- [AI Employees](https://kairoxly.com/ai-employees.html)
- [Pricing](https://kairoxly.com/pricing.html)
- [Contact](https://kairoxly.com/contact.html)

## Industry pages

- [Real Estate AI Automation](https://kairoxly.com/industries/real-estate.html)
- [Healthcare AI Automation](https://kairoxly.com/industries/healthcare.html)
- [Retail AI Automation](https://kairoxly.com/industries/retail.html)
- [Professional Services AI Automation](https://kairoxly.com/industries/professional-services.html)

## Company facts

- Company: Kairox FZC LLC
- Location: Amber Gem Tower, Sheikh Khalifa Street, Ajman, UAE
- Email: kairoxly@gmail.com
- WhatsApp: +971 52 285 5000
- Starting subscription: AED 750/month
- Setup/business process design: from AED 1500
- Primary market: UAE SMEs and growing businesses
- Languages supported in customer-facing automation: English and Arabic

## Core services

- AI sales automation
- AI customer support agents
- WhatsApp AI automation
- AI receptionist and voice AI
- Appointment booking automation
- CRM and reporting workflow automation
- n8n business process automation
- Custom AI agents and AI employees

## Short answer

Kairox AI helps UAE SMEs automate sales, support, WhatsApp, booking, reception and repetitive operations using AI employees and custom workflows. The company is based in Ajman, UAE, and pricing starts from AED 750/month for one AI employee, excluding setup.
